phrases.translation: Therefore, I will divide to him many.
phrases.summary: The speaker states that, because of what preceded, they will apportion “many” to the person being addressed.

phrases.translation: and with the mighty he will divide spoil.
phrases.summary: The speaker describes the person as sharing (“dividing”) spoils together with the “mighty,” indicating participation in receiving and distributing the spoils.

phrases.translation: because he poured out his life unto death,
phrases.summary: The speaker explains the basis for the reward: the person willingly gave up his life to death (“poured out” his life), framing it as a decisive action.

phrases.translation: and he was counted among the transgressors.
phrases.summary: The speaker states that the person was regarded/numbered as being among the transgressors, describing his inclusion in that group.

phrases.translation: and he bore the sin of many.
phrases.summary: The speaker describes the person as taking responsibility for carrying others’ wrongdoing—“bearing” the sin of many.

phrases.translation: and he made intercession for the transgressors.
phrases.summary: The speaker indicates that the person actively intervenes on behalf of the transgressors, doing so through intercession.
